ddls:
CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level range */,
  "recommend_group" INTEGER /* Group recommendation for challenges */,
  "level_from" INTEGER /* Starting level of the range */,
  "level_to" INTEGER /* Ending level of the range */,
  "attack_party_count" INTEGER /* Recommended number of attack party members */,
  "magic_party_count" INTEGER /* Recommended number of magic party members */,
  "xp_required" INTEGER /* Experience points required to reach the next level */,
  "challenge_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the challenges within this range */,
  "reward_xp" INTEGER /* Experience points awarded for completing challenges in this range */,
  "reward_items" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of item IDs that can be rewarded for completing challenges in this range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_recommend_group FOREIGN KEY ("recommend_group") REFERENCES recommend_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommend_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommend group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the recommend group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recommend group */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required in a party for this group */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in a party for this group */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the group is available only to premium users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class or role of the character */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the character */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the character has */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the character last logged into the game */,
  "last_level_up_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the character last leveled up */,
  "total_hours_played" INTEGER /* Total number of hours the character has played in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the game */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged into the game */,
  "total_hours_played" INTEGER /* Total number of hours the user has played in the game */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has a premium account */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's premium subscription, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who is the party leader */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was formed */,
  "party_status" TEXT /* Current status of the party (e.g., Active, Disbanded) */,
  "total_challenges_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of challenges completed by the party */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the party members for completed challenges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parties_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party member */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character in the party */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the character joined the party */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the party */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the member in the party (e.g., Active, Left) */,
  "contribution_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the member's contribution to the party's success */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_members_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_members_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the challenge */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level range for the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "xp_reward" INTEGER /* Experience points awarded for completing the challenge */,
  "gold_reward" INTEGER /* Amount of gold awarded for completing the challenge */,
  "reward_items" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of item IDs that can be rewarded for completing the challenge */,
  "challenge_type" TEXT /* Type of challenge (e.g., Dungeon, Quest, Event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenges_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_completions" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge completion */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party that completed the challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the challenge was completed */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the party for the challenge */,
  "xp_earned" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the party for completing the challenge */,
  "gold_earned" INTEGER /* Amount of gold earned by the party for completing the challenge */,
  "items_obtained" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of item IDs obtained by the party for completing the challenge */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken (in minutes) to complete the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_completions_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_challenge_completions_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, consumable) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "purchase_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the item can be purchased in the game */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the item can be sold in the game */,
  "item_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the item's icon image */,
  "item_level" INTEGER /* Level requirement to use the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)
